# Roles whose CI matrix entry should include the `minimal` variant
# (vanilla Ubuntu cloud image: ext4, snapd + cloud-init preinstalled)
# on top of the default `box` (debootstrap'd ZFS rpool).
#
# Read by mise-tasks/ci/detect-roles. Same shape as ci-lab-roles.txt:
# one role per line; comments + blank lines OK. Add roles here when
# behaviour genuinely differs against a host where the upstream-
# shipped packages it removes/replaces are actually present — e.g.
# cleanup exercises the snap-removal path only when snapd was
# preinstalled.

cleanup
